notes:
v0.4.1 — updates now find you.

Voquence now checks for new versions automatically when it launches. If one is live, a small banner appears in the main window: hit INSTALL and the app updates and restarts itself in about ten seconds, or hit LATER and it stays out of your way until next launch. No more digging into Settings to find out a release exists. (Settings → Updates still works if you prefer checking manually.)

Also: removed the leftover 'WEEK 4 BUILD' label from the main window header. The app just shows its version now.

This is the last update you'll ever have to go looking for.
